Package de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op

Interface Operator

All Superinterfaces:
EqualsModProofIrrelevancy, Named, Operator, SyntaxElement
All Known Subinterfaces:
IObserverFunction, IProgramMethod, IProgramVariable, ProgramConstruct, QuantifiableVariable, TermTransformer, UpdateableOperator
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractSortedOperator, AbstractTermTransformer, AddCast, ArrayBaseInstanceOf, ConstantValue, CreateBeforeLoopUpdate, CreateFrameCond, CreateHeapAnonUpdate, CreateLocalAnonUpdate, CreateWellformedCond, DivideLCRMonomials, DivideMonomials, ElementaryUpdate, EnumConstantValue, Equality, ExpandQueriesMetaConstruct, FormulaSV, IfExThenElse, IfThenElse, IntroAtPreDefsOp, JFunction, Junctor, LocationVariable, LogicVariable, MemberPVToField, MetaAdd, MetaArithBitMaskOp, MetaBinaryAnd, MetaBinaryOr, MetaBinaryXOr, MetaDiv, MetaEqual, MetaGeq, MetaGreater, MetaLeq, MetaLess, MetaMul, MetaPow, MetaShift, MetaShiftLeft, MetaShiftRight, MetaSub, Metavariable, Modality, ObserverEqualityMetaConstruct, ObserverFunction, OperatorSV, ProgramConstant, ProgramMethod, ProgramSV, ProgramVariable, Quantifier, SkolemTermSV, SortDependingFunction, SubstOp, TermLabelSV, TermSV, Transformer, UpdateApplication, UpdateJunctor, UpdateSV, VariableSV, WarySubstOp
public interface Operator extends Operator, EqualsModProofIrrelevancy
All symbols acting as members of a term e.g. logical operators, predicates, functions, variables etc. have to implement this interface.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default boolean
    equalsModProofIrrelevancy(Object obj)
    Checks whether this object and the other object represent the same data, whilst ignoring attributes that are not relevant for the purpose of these objects in the proof.
    default int
    hashCodeModProofIrrelevancy()
    Compute a hashcode that represents the proof-relevant fields of this object.
    static boolean
    opEquals(Operator fst, Operator snd)
    comparator to compare operators; for modalities only their kind is compared

  • Method Details

    • opEquals

      static boolean opEquals(Operator fst, Operator snd)
      comparator to compare operators; for modalities only their kind is compared
      Parameters:
      fst - the first Operator
      snd - th second Operator
      Returns:
      true iff both operators have same identity and for modalities if both are of the same kind

    • equalsModProofIrrelevancy

      default boolean equalsModProofIrrelevancy(Object obj)
      Description copied from interface: EqualsModProofIrrelevancy
      Checks whether this object and the other object represent the same data, whilst ignoring attributes that are not relevant for the purpose of these objects in the proof.
      Specified by:
      equalsModProofIrrelevancy in interface EqualsModProofIrrelevancy
      Parameters:
      obj - other object
      Returns:
      whether these objects are equal

    • hashCodeModProofIrrelevancy

      default int hashCodeModProofIrrelevancy()
      Description copied from interface: EqualsModProofIrrelevancy
      Compute a hashcode that represents the proof-relevant fields of this object.
      Specified by:
      hashCodeModProofIrrelevancy in interface EqualsModProofIrrelevancy
      Returns:
      the hashcode
